prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ed98d772`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ed98d772` as a fixed 2×2 tiling of the `3x3` input in four orientations: original, `rot270`, `rot180`, and `rot90`. I used the Opus summary after checking it against all official examples; the Sonnet hint was only vague, not wrong. No new primitive was needed.

Official verification passed `6/6`, the shared builder produced 1000 examples, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the preview sheet. The generator matches the task family by keeping inputs at `3x3`, using zero background plus one foreground color, sampling `4-7` foreground cells, and rejecting fully rotation-invariant patterns so the quadrant orientations usually matter.
